title: Daily Report Log
description: Log of generated daily reports across different events.

date.description: The date of the report, e.g., '2026-03-25'

total_score.description: The total risk score calculated for the day.

level.description: The risk level categorization, e.g., '绿色', '黄色', '红色'.

trend_vs_previous.description: The trend compared to the previous report: '升温', '降温', '持平' or 'N/A'.

file_path.description: The relative path to the generated markdown report.
